# Processes

## Services

### emberglow (main process)

- **Type**: CLI tool
- **Entry point**: `cmd/emberglow/main.go`
- **Modes**: `example`, `check`, `run`, `devices`
- **Runtime**: Blocks on event loop (`select{}`)

### Device Drivers (planned)

Device drivers are not yet implemented. The engine stubs out these drivers:

| Driver | Protocol | Status |
|--------|----------|--------|
| hue_bulb | Philips Hue local bridge API | Planned |
| smart_plug | Local REST | Planned |
| motion_sensor | MQTT | Planned |
| thermostat | ecobee / Nest local API | Planned |
| virtual_clock | Software clock | Planned |
| webhook | Outbound HTTP | Planned |
| scene | Logical grouping | Planned |

## Build & Run Topology

```
go run ./cmd/emberglow <command> <file>
```

### Commands

| Command | Action |
|---------|--------|
| `example` | Print an example `.ember` recipe |
| `check` | Validate a recipe file |
| `run` | Execute a recipe (blocks) |
| `devices` | List supported device drivers |

## Process Flow

```
Recipe file (.ember YAML)
        ↓
   dsl.Parse()     ← internal/dsl/parser.go
        ↓
   Recipe struct   ← Recipe/Device/Rule/Trigger/Action types
        ↓
   Engine.Run()    ← internal/engine/engine.go
        ↓
   Event loop      ← Currently a stub (select{})
        ↓
   Device drivers  ← Not yet implemented
```
